expo.name: LiveWithMS
expo.description: A calm, emotionally safe support environment for people living with MS. Designed to reduce overwhelm, support steadiness, and make difficult periods feel lighter and more manageable.

infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: LiveWithMS uses voice input so you can speak instead of typing.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: LiveWithMS may access your photo library only when you choose to attach or upload an image.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: LiveWithMS uses voice input so you can speak instead of typing.

plugins.microphonePermission: LiveWithMS uses voice input so you can speak instead of typing.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: LiveWithMS uses voice input so you can speak instead of typing.
